'''changata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabuli|kabuli]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ng-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabuli|kabuli]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| changata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chængætæth|chængætæth]] || [[word:chængætæj|chængætæj]] || [[word:chængætæsh|chængætæsh]] || [[word:chængætæ|chængætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:changangatath|changangatath]] || [[word:changangataj|changangataj]] || [[word:changangatash|changangatash]] || [[word:changangata|changangata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:changatath|changatath]] || [[word:changataj|changataj]] || [[word:changatash|changatash]] || [[word:changata|changata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:changaftath|changaftath]] || [[word:changaftaj|changaftaj]] || [[word:changaftash|changaftash]] || [[word:changaftaf|changaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:changatatha|changatatha]] || [[word:changataja|changataja]] || [[word:changatasha|changatasha]] || [[word:changataka|changataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:changatath|changatath]] || [[word:changataj|changataj]] || [[word:changatash|changatash]] || [[word:changata|changata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:changatathal|changatathal]] || [[word:changatajal|changatajal]] || [[word:changatashal|changatashal]] || [[word:changatakal|changatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:changatathatha|changatathatha]] || [[word:changatajaja|changatajaja]] || [[word:changatashasha|changatashasha]] || [[word:changataka|changataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:changatathan|changatathan]] || [[word:changatajan|changatajan]] || [[word:changatashan|changatashan]] || [[word:changatakan|changatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:changatathaoro|changatathaoro]] || [[word:changatajaoro|changatajaoro]] || [[word:changatashaoro|changatashaoro]] || [[word:changatakaoro|changatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
